channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Judges navigate AI's role in the courtroom
item.description: Judges are setting AI guidelines for lawyers and litigants, and penalizing those who fail to verify their submissions.

item.title: Nancy Mace and Ralph Norman still considering Senate bids despite Trump's snub
item.description: Reps. Nancy Mace and Ralph Norman are weighing Senate runs even after President Trump endorsed another candidate.

item.title: Trump endorses Lindsey Graham's sister in Senate special election
item.description: President Trump has backed Darline Graham Nordone, sister of the late Sen. Lindsey Graham, in the upcoming special election.

item.title: Trump threatens higher tariffs over Canadian wildfire smoke
item.description: President Trump is considering raising tariffs on Canada due to wildfire smoke drifting into the U.S. and causing health alerts.
